title: My experience with remote controlled vehicles - Request

transcript.text: Hello, video request, and this one is from Rod, Ron Stoddinger, who goes, hi Kyle, video
Request, have you ever had experience with RC cars or any other radio controlled vehicle?
Interesting video request, when I was about, in 6th grade I think it was, so when I was
About 12 or something like that, I liked, decided that I really liked remote controlled, like
Off road cars, those little things with the big wheels that were really big and then the
Thinner front wheels and had the really good suspension and everything, I really wanted
To have one to be able to like jump it over jumps, you know, and jump it perfectly, kind
Of like BMX people, jump on them and just race them really well and get really good,
I mean I'd love to have one right now and do that, it seems like fun, but yeah, so I told
My mom that's what I wanted for Christmas and then like before Christmas, I went and snuck
Around and found the place in the house where she was like hiding the presents and it was
This, it was called a hunter and I remember telling her before Christmas, I was like, you
Know, I was doing research and I think I really liked the hunter because I was trying to make
Her feel good, like she got the right thing and she kind of looked at me like I was getting
Nuts or didn't, so I don't know if she liked, she didn't say anything, but anyways, I got
The hunter and it was one of those that you put together and it had a, it had a plastic
Frame on it that you would attach everything to and so I put it together and then I like
Drove it for like a second or something and then it broke and I had to get a whole, like
The frame broke, it was this plastic frame that all the pieces were on, so I had to like
Order another frame and wait forever to get it and I, you know, I think I maybe had to
Save up for it or something and finally came in the mail and I put it together and I was
All excited to finally have it and I, I was, it was in the garage and I turned it on and
I went, I drove it to do one of those little spin things and it spun right around into a,
Into a, uh, like, uh, the closet that was in into the, into, in the, uh, side of the garage
And it was just at such an angle that it hit the closet and it pushed like the wheel down
And it broke the frame again, like right when I first put it together, so I actually never
Got to drive it, even though I had to replace the frame twice, I was, I was like, are you
Fucking kidding me?
Fuck this thing then, I'm never, and I just threw away and that was it with that and that,
That was my experience with remote controlled cars, so I pretty much don't have experience
With remote controlled cars, I, other than building it twice, um, that'd be cool to have
One of those really fast ones that can, that are like gas powered and they can go on the
Road and race them, I'd love to race them, I love racing cars, um, car race games on the
Video game, on the, on like an intent PlayStation, in fact my brother has a PlayStation with a bunch
Of games, one of them is Grand The, I mean, uh, Gran Turismo, I should, I'm
Going to borrow it from them, dude, get all, when I start smoking weed at the beginning
Of the year, get all high and play those video games with my roommate, um, and you can even
Like rent them at the Redbox, but, um, I don't think my brother uses it anymore, because last
Time I told him, he said, asked him, he said that and hadn't played it for like two months,
But, um, that's the only experience I've ever had with a remote control, um, I remember back
In like the early 80s, they had those ones that could only go left and you, you'd go, you'd
Do it and then you'd do left and then go back and that was like ridiculously stupid,
I don't know anybody, how anybody could have, would have bought that and had fun driving
It, um, oh, I remember, dude, when I was in Chile, like 10 years ago, they were selling
These remote control cars that were really little, they were as big as matchbox cars and
You could drive them around just like normal remote control cars, only problem is they broke
After a little while, but that would be fun to have one of those, I'd totally have one
Of those and play around with it, I'd like play with the hamsters, chase the hamsters
Around with it and stuff, um, and when my mom got a, got a new phone, I think it was
Her first smartphone a few months ago, like six months ago or something, I went into the
Store with her and I talked her into, or the lady also who was there kind of talked her
Into getting one of those helicopters, it's about this big and it was only like 20 bucks
And, um, we brought it home and I couldn't do it because my phone wasn't compatible, I had
A Windows phone and Windows phones like aren't compatible with any app, dude, they're like
Usually, they're not even, they're like halfway smartphones, um, the only real smartphones are
Going to be the Apple and the, uh, the Android ones and I just ordered an Android one, so,
Because, because my brother, he had an Android and he was able to play it and he just put this
Little, the little controller on top of his cell phone and he's playing it and got really good
At it for a while and then I guess he burnt out and hasn't done it for a while, so I'll, I'll go
Grab it and, um, and, um, and go play, uh, a helicopter, maybe, you know, scare the hamsters
With that, play with the hamsters and try to do fancy stuff, that'd be fun, I love that
Kind of stuff, it's like, you know, with your timing and, uh, you know, learning how to get
Good at it and stuff, have like little obstacle courses, like see if I can fly it around that
And then back and land it on the table and stuff, yeah, I'm going to do that, thanks
For reminding me, um, and, uh, yeah, that's about that, I remember once I went on a mountain
Bike ride with my friend and we were in North Boulder and there was this, like, there was
This, like, field where people would fly their, um, fly their remote control planes and there's
This really big remote control plane and there was this guy there flying it and he was, he
Was bragging about how his plane was totally badass and how he, it was his favorite plane
Ever and it was, you know, and he'd, he'd been fixing it up and all this kind of stuff
And, and he gave, and he gave the remote, the control to my friend and he said, here,
Here, do this, do a loop and he did a loop, he did a total, like, loop-dee-dip, you know,
And then right as he came out of the loop, he's like, see, you did it, isn't that thing
Awesome and then he was, as he was giving it back to the guy, it, like, did a nosedive
And fucking crashed and smut, smut, destroyed his plane and the guy was like, oh, shit,
You could tell he was totally heartbroken but he was like, it wasn't your fault and
We were like, oh, shit, we got, it was, like, awkward and we left, but, uh, it was the only
Experience with the remote control planes, those would be fun, um, I don't know if I'd
Want to play with a remote control helicopter because what if you accidentally, like, crash
It into somebody or yourself, you know, those things could hurt, but, um, but, yeah, that's
My experience with the remote control vehicles, peace out.
